title: Freeze the fedora-minimal image reference at Fedora 38
body:
... because the tests are assuming a v2s2 image, but as of Fedora 39, the image uses the OCI format.

See e.g. https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/task/6504550402621440/logs/integration.log for the test failures this is trying to fix.

comments.body: Merging without review in order to unblock CI for everyone.
